title: Malaxis mambulilingensis
taxonomy: Malaxis mambulilingensis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Malaxis and is native to the Philippines. The species was first described in 2013. Further classification places it in the subtribe Malaxidinae within the tribe Orchideae. Malaxis mambulilingensis is considered a rare and endemic species.
